title: Prompt Library
dialogDescription: A prompt maintained by the platform for quick insertion in chat. Users can view it only and cannot edit it.
skillDialogDescription: A built-in skill is defined by one SKILL.md. When loaded, it is used only as context for the current turn and does not run commands.
deleteDescription: The built-in prompt will no longer be shown to users. User custom prompts are not affected.
deleteSkillDescription: The built-in skill will no longer be shown to users. User custom skills are not affected.

skillsPrompt.label: Skills prompt
skillsPrompt.description: Controls how the model interprets and uses loaded skills. Leave empty to use the built-in default prompt.

settings.defaultPromptPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the built-in default prompt

toast.tooLong: Name can be up to 64 characters, description up to 256 characters, and content up to 10000 characters.
toast.skillTooLong: Name can be up to 64 characters, description up to 256 characters, and SKILL.md up to 10000 characters.
toast.signInAgain: Please sign in again to continue.
